name: Quickie Peach Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Cream together butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Add egg and beat well.
4. Stir in peaches.
5. Sift flour, baking soda, nutmeg, cinnamon, and salt into a separate bowl.
6. Mix dry ingredients into peach mixture.
7. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch square pan.
8. Sprinkle walnuts on top.
9. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the center is set.
